layout_autumn.name: Autumn/Winter layout self-heal
layout_autumn.prompt: Match QuietLuxury old-money energy and auto-align coat renderings.

palette_generator.name: Multidimensional palette trend analysis
palette_generator.prompt: Render RGB and hex palettes instantly for high-weighted categories.

spu_poster_synth.name: Multimodal product poster layout
spu_poster_synth.prompt: Integrate with Gemini-2.0 Imageify for poster assembly.

factory_reorder.name: Flexible OEM reorder
factory_reorder.prompt: Trigger blanket orders when SPU stock falls below 20% threshold.

lead_time_forecast.name: Upstream fabric lead time forecast
lead_time_forecast.prompt: Calculate in-transit material days using multi-dimensional regression.

supplier_pricing_guard.name: Supplier cost fluctuation guard
supplier_pricing_guard.prompt: Lock raw material escalation caps and tier discount purchase orders.

voucher_balancing.name: Voucher balancing optimization
voucher_balancing.prompt: Reconcile weekly rebates to ensure single-order net margin > 20%.

conversion_tuning.name: Conversion tuning autopilot
conversion_tuning.prompt: Track funnel leak and micro-adjust pricing in real time.

tax_hedge_recon.name: Cross-border tax hedge reconciliation
tax_hedge_recon.prompt: Compare Stripe revenue with customs invoices to hedge FX settlement losses.

refund_authenticator.name: VIP refund authenticator
refund_authenticator.prompt: Intercept complaint causes and refund along the original path.

reappointment_handler.name: Appointment rescheduling handler
reappointment_handler.prompt: Trigger CRM refunds and book next-day VIP service in the early hours.

antifraud_screener.name: Group-buy fraud screener
antifraud_screener.prompt: Compare registration credit scores and block multi-account returns.

ad_bidding_calculator.name: Social ad bidding calculator
ad_bidding_calculator.prompt: Track trending keywords on Xiaohongshu and TikTok.

seo_dynamic_injector.name: SEO hot keyword injector
seo_dynamic_injector.prompt: Rewrite top-selling keywords into store product titles automatically.

token_cost_ledger.name: Daily compute cost ledger
token_cost_ledger.prompt: Compare each agent’s consumption and generate daily token accounting.

payouts_tax_calculator.name: Payouts tax calculator
payouts_tax_calculator.prompt: Aggregate Stripe tax invoices and offset cross-border fees.
